Options.OPTION_DESCRIPTION[DedicatedTurn: When Traffic is detected, Dedicated Turn Lanes can repair Traffic lane connections after creating dedicated turn lane segments.
Options.WARNING[DedicatedTurnLanes.Pocke: Traffic was not detected. Dedicated turn lane segments can still be created, but Traffic lane connection repair will not run.
Options.OPTION_DESCRIPTION[DedicatedTurn: Turns on detailed troubleshooting logs. Leave this off for normal play; it does not change how dedicated turn lanes work.
Assets.DESCRIPTION[DedicatedTurnLanesToo: Activate the Dedicated Turn Lanes tool to create dedicated turn lane segments at road intersections.
Options.OPTION_DESCRIPTION[DedicatedTurn: When Traffic is detected, Dedicated Turn Lanes Alpha can repair Traffic lane connections after creating dedicated turn lane segments.
Traffic was not detected. Dedicated turn lane segments can still be created, but Traffic lane connection repair will not run.
Options.OPTION_DESCRIPTION[DedicatedTurn: Turns on detailed troubleshooting logs for the alpha build. Leave this off for normal play; it does not change how dedicated turn lanes work.
Assets.DESCRIPTION[DedicatedTurnLanesAlp: Activate the Dedicated Turn Lanes Alpha tool to create dedicated turn lane segments at road intersections.
Options.OPTION_DESCRIPTION[DedicatedTurn: When Traffic is detected, Dedicated Turn Lanes Dev can repair Traffic lane connections after creating dedicated turn lane segments.
Options.WARNING[DedicatedTurnLanesDev.Po: Traffic was not detected. Dedicated turn lane segments can still be created, but Traffic lane connection repair will not run.
Options.OPTION_DESCRIPTION[DedicatedTurn: Turns on detailed troubleshooting logs for the dev build. Leave this off for normal play; it does not change how dedicated turn lanes work.
Assets.DESCRIPTION[DedicatedTurnLanesDev: Activate the Dedicated Turn Lanes Dev tool to create dedicated turn lane segments at road intersections.
